details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. The provider package is complete with proper package.json, factory function (createPixelArt), and PixelArtProvider that correctly supports only image generation. PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3 with doGenerate method, proper image settings (size, style with 'pixel'/'retro'/'8bit', pixelDensity), and base URL set correctly to https://api.pixelart.ai/v1. Package structure follows SDK patterns with proper TypeScript configs, tests, and build setup. All image/text/embedding endpoints properly throw NoSuchModelError. Minor deviation: the root tsconfig.json was modified (added pixelart reference) rather than only creating new files. While necessary for monorepo integration and not violating the spirit of the requirement, this technically modifies an existing file. All 16 new files in packages/pixelart are properly created with comprehensive test coverage.
